subject: Project Management
title: The Rise of the Scrum Master
description: A quick win: understand The Rise of the Scrum Master.

hook.text: In the 1990s, a new job title appeared: 'Scrum Master.' Nobody knew what it meant.

buildup.text: The Scrum Master doesn't manage the team — they remove obstacles and protect focus.

discovery.text: The role was inspired by rugby, where the scrum is a formation that moves together.

twist.text: By 2020, it was one of tech's fastest-growing job titles — and most debated.

climax.text: The role proved that sometimes the best manager stops managing.

punchline.text: A leader who leads by getting out of the way.

quiz.question: What is the Scrum Master's primary role?
options: Removing obstacles and protecting the team's focus
